scripts.test:grok:transaction-agent: cd supabase && unset OPENROUTER_API_KEY && deno test --no-check --env-file="functions/.env" --allow-env --allow-net "functions/_shared/ai/transaction-agent.integration.test.ts"
scripts.check: bun run lint && bun run format:check
scripts.docker:shell: PROJECT_ROOT=$(pwd) docker compose exec supabase-cli sh
scripts.docker:db:reset: PROJECT_ROOT=$(pwd) docker compose run --rm supabase-cli sh -lc "supabase start && supabase db reset --local"
scripts.docker:db:migration:up: PROJECT_ROOT=$(pwd) docker compose run --rm supabase-cli sh -lc "supabase start && supabase migration up --include-all --local"
scripts.docker:db:types: PROJECT_ROOT=$(pwd) docker compose run --rm supabase-cli sh -lc "supabase start && supabase gen types typescript --local > packages/frontend/src/types/database.types.ts"
